channel.title: Attendance on Ventryx – Visitor & Attendance Management Software India
channel.description: Recent content in Attendance on Ventryx – Visitor & Attendance Management Software India

item.title: Manual vs Digital Attendance Tracking: The Real Cost for Indian SMEs
item.description: Walk into a mid-sized manufacturing unit in Pune or a growing IT services firm in Hyderabad, and you will likely find one of two scenes: a dog-eared register sitting near the front desk with ink smudges from a hundred different pens, or a biometric device mounted on the wall with a small queue of employees waiting to punch in at 9:01 AM. Both of these are attempts to solve the same problem - knowing who showed up, when, and for how long.

item.title: Shift Management in India: How to Handle Night Shifts, Overtime, and Comp-Off Without Spreadsheets
item.description: Walk into any large manufacturing plant in Pune, a BPO operation in Hyderabad, a private hospital in Chennai, or a retail chain in Delhi NCR, and you will find one thing in common: attendance management is exponentially harder than it looks on paper. When your workforce runs across two or three shifts around the clock, the complexity of tracking who worked when, who earned overtime, and who is owed a comp-off grows faster than most spreadsheets can handle.
